name: SINT Protocol
description: Installable security-first MCP proxy with policy enforcement — scan tools for risks (T0–T3 tiers), enforce approval gates, and produce hash-chained audit trails. OWASP ASI05 compliant.

tools.name: sint__status
tools.description: Show SINT MCP status: connected servers, agent identity, queue size, and system health

tools.name: sint__servers
tools.description: List all downstream MCP servers with connection status, tool counts, and health

tools.name: sint__whoami
tools.description: Show current agent identity: public key, active token, session info

tools.name: sint__pending
tools.description: List all pending approval requests awaiting human review

tools.name: sint__approve
tools.description: Approve a pending escalated action by its request ID

tools.name: sint__deny
tools.description: Deny a pending escalated action by its request ID

tools.name: sint__audit
tools.description: Query the SINT evidence ledger for recent decisions and events

tools.name: sint__add_server
tools.description: Dynamically add a new downstream MCP server at runtime

tools.name: sint__remove_server
tools.description: Remove a downstream MCP server by name

tools.name: sint__issue_token
tools.description: Issue a new capability token with specified permissions and constraints

tools.name: sint__revoke_token
tools.description: Revoke an active capability token

tools.name: sint__interface_status
tools.description: Show operator interface session state and mode

tools.name: sint__recall_memory
tools.description: Recall stored agent memory by key or search

tools.name: sint__store_memory
tools.description: Store a key-value memory entry for agent persistence

tools.name: sint__speak
tools.description: Send a message to the operator interface

tools.name: sint__show_hud
tools.description: Display a HUD overlay on the operator interface

tools.name: sint__notify
tools.description: Send a notification to the operator

tools.name: sint__interface_mode
tools.description: Switch operator interface mode (autonomous, supervised, manual)

tools.name: sint__delegate_to_agent
tools.description: Delegate a task to another agent with scoped capability token

tools.name: sint__list_delegations
tools.description: List active delegation chains from this agent

tools.name: sint__revoke_delegation_tree
tools.description: Revoke an entire delegation subtree by root token
